summary: Decisions issued by OATH's Hearings Division grew steadily through FY25, tracking a sharp rise in summonses filed by city enforcement agencies, which topped one million in a single fiscal year for the first time. The lower FY26 figure in this dataset is a partial-year, year-to-date total rather than a full 12 months; OATH's preliminary FY26 report actually shows decisions issued running about 12 percent ahead of the same period a year earlier, so a full-year FY26 total would likely exceed FY25's, not fall short of it.

sources.label: OATH, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report
